automation_helper_sheet_id: Sheet id where you have the Global config sheet and Station Mapping sheet
spreadsheet_id: The id of the sheet where the Repot, Station Status, Logs and HeartbeatLogs sheets will be created
kra_checker_drive_id: Drive id of the kra_checker file to be download once uploaded to your google drive
heartbeat_monitor_drive_id: Drive id of the heartbeat_monitor file to be download once uploaded to your google drive
